title: Das kunstseidene Mädchen
writer: René Barjavel, Julien Duvivier, Irmgard Keun
actors: Giulietta Masina, Gustav Knuth, Gert Fröbe
plot: Doris Putzke is fond of dating men in her quest for finding the perfect one. In her brief relationships, she goes from one disillusionment to another, constantly deluding herself about the intentions of her lovers.
